entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The primary agricultural crop focused on in the research and development partnership in Vietnam

entities.name: VIETNAM
entities.description: The country where the groundnut research and development partnership was implemented

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop yield and efficiency that increased due to the partnership

entities.name: OPI
entities.description: The organization in the South that played a major role in the groundnut partnership and developed improved varieties

entities.name: VASI
entities.description: The organization in the North that contributed to the productivity of the groundnut partnership

entities.name: NIPP
entities.description: The organization in the North that contributed to the productivity of the groundnut partnership

entities.name: CAPACITY BUILDING
entities.description: One of the significant achievements of the partnership involving the development of skills and resources

entities.name: GENETIC AND BREEDING RESOURCES
entities.description: Resources enriched through the partnership to improve crop quality

entities.name: CROP NUTRITION
entities.description: A focus area of the partnership achievements related to plant nutrients

entities.name: PLANT PROTECTION
entities.description: A focus area of the partnership achievements related to safeguarding crops from pests and diseases

entities.name: PRODUCTION TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: A focus area of the partnership achievements regarding the methods of crop production

entities.name: IMPROVED VARIETIES
entities.description: Enhanced groundnut varieties developed and released by OPI

entities.name: AGA
entities.description: Alternative coconut ash, a commercialized substitute for natural coconut ash used as fertilizer

entities.name: FERTILIZER
entities.description: Substances used to provide nutrients to the groundnut crop

entities.name: CONFECTIONERY VARIETIES
entities.description: Groundnut varieties specifically developed for confectionery use

entities.name: O/L RATIO
entities.description: The oil to leucine ratio, a quality trait desired in confectionery groundnut varieties

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The presence of toxic aflatoxins in groundnuts, identified as a future research need for containment
